description:
Generate high-quality images, posters, and logos with Ideogram V3. Features exceptional typography handling and realistic outputs optimized for commercial and creative use. 

Note:
Send one image with a prompt for image remixing/restyling. 
Send two images (one an image and the other a black-and-white mask image denoting an area) for image editing.

Optional parameters:
Set aspect ratio. Select from (5:4, 4:3, 4:5, 1:1, 1:2, 1:3, 3:4, 3:1, 3:2, 2:1, 2:3, 16:9, 16:10, 10:16, 9:16). It is set to 4:3 aspect ratio as default.
Set style. Select the desired style preset. No style set as default.
